# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

# values.yaml
replicaCount: 1

# deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "platform.name" . }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "platform.name" . }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "platform.name" . }}
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
        image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
        securityContext:
          privileged: true
        volumeMounts:
        - name: persistent-storage
          mountPath: /data

# service.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "platform.name" . }}
spec:
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "platform.name" . }}
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
    targetPort: 8080

# requirements.yaml
dependencies:
- name: helm-toolkit
  version: ^1.5.0
